lyrics.text: My visual line has been taken out my visual line and this is the album My blood is not sleeping, you're on your tip Be toes creeping, look around like no one knows Think you're so criminal Roses on both my knees, feel it don't sleep Thank you, hope please, I do what I want When I'm wanting to know my soul, so cynical So you're a talk fight like you really rough fight Just can't get enough fight, just always so puff fight I'm not bad type, make your mom a sad type Make your girlfriend mad type, when she does your dad type I'm not bad guy I'm not bad type I like it when you take control even if you know that you don't own me I like to play the role I'll be your animal My mom, me likes to sing along with me But she won't sing this song if she needs all the pain We shall pity the man I know So you're a talk fight like you really rough fight Just can't get enough fight, just always so puff fight I'm not bad type, make your mom a sad type Make your girlfriend mad type, when she does your dad type I'm not bad guy I'm not bad type, make your mom a sad type I'm not bad type, make your mom a sad type I like when you get mad I guess I'm pretty glad that you're alone You said she's scared of me, I mean I don't see what she sees but maybe it's because I'm wearing a cologne

segments.text: My visual line has been taken out my visual line and this is the album
My blood is not sleeping, you're on your tip
Be toes creeping, look around like no one knows
Think you're so criminal
Roses on both my knees, feel it don't sleep
Thank you, hope please, I do what I want
When I'm wanting to know my soul, so cynical
So you're a talk fight like you really rough fight
Just can't get enough fight, just always so puff fight
I'm not bad type, make your mom a sad type
Make your girlfriend mad type, when she does your dad type
I'm not bad guy
I'm not bad type
I like it when you take control even if you know that you don't own me
I like to play the role I'll be your animal
My mom, me likes to sing along with me
But she won't sing this song if she needs all the pain
We shall pity the man I know
So you're a talk fight like you really rough fight
Just can't get enough fight, just always so puff fight
I'm not bad type, make your mom a sad type
Make your girlfriend mad type, when she does your dad type
I'm not bad guy
I'm not bad type, make your mom a sad type
I'm not bad type, make your mom a sad type
I like when you get mad
I guess I'm pretty glad that you're alone
You said she's scared of me, I mean
I don't see what she sees but maybe it's because I'm wearing a cologne
